steps.title: Locate the intersection
steps.content: The solution to a graphed system is the point where the two graphs intersect. Here, the line and the nonlinear graph meet at one visible point.

steps.title: Read the coordinates
steps.content: From the grid, the intersection has $x$-coordinate $4$ and $y$-coordinate $5$, so the solution is $(4,5)$. The answer is C.
